BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 1100-H14
BulkDetails.Description: Commercially pure, great for forming

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 2014-T6
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength forging alloy, used in aerospace structures

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 2024-T3
BulkDetails.Description: Aerospace alloy, excellent fatigue resistance

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 5052-H32
BulkDetails.Description: Marine-grade, good corrosion resistance

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 5083-H116
BulkDetails.Description: Marine grade aluminum, used in cryogenic tanks

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 6061-T6
BulkDetails.Description: Wrought aluminum, common for airframes and tanks

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 6063-T5
BulkDetails.Description: Architectural aluminum, good for extrusions

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 6063-T6
BulkDetails.Description: Heat-treated architectural aluminum

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 7075-T6
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength aluminum alloy for critical structures

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 7079-T6
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength aluminum, used in aircraft forgings

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum 8090 (Al-Li)
BulkDetails.Description: Aluminum-lithium alloy, very low density

BulkDetails.Name: Magnesium AZ31B
BulkDetails.Description: Lightweight magnesium alloy for weight-critical parts

BulkDetails.Name: Magnesium AZ61A
BulkDetails.Description: Moderate strength magnesium alloy

BulkDetails.Name: Magnesium ZK60A
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength magnesium alloy

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium CP Grade 1
BulkDetails.Description: Commercially pure, soft and formable

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium CP Grade 2
BulkDetails.Description: Commercially pure titanium, corrosion resistant

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium CP Grade 3
BulkDetails.Description: Medium-strength commercial purity

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium CP Grade 4
BulkDetails.Description: Highest strength commercially pure titanium

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium Ti-6Al-4V
BulkDetails.Description: High strength-to-weight ratio titanium alloy for engine parts and pressure vessels

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium Ti-5Al-2.5Sn
BulkDetails.Description: Alpha alloy for high-temperature applications

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium Ti-6Al-2Sn-4Zr-2Mo
BulkDetails.Description: High-temperature titanium alloy

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium Ti-15V-3Cr-3Sn-3Al
BulkDetails.Description: Beta titanium for cold forming

BulkDetails.Name: Titanium Beta-C
BulkDetails.Description: Metastable beta alloy, high strength

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 1018 (Mild Steel)
BulkDetails.Description: General purpose low carbon steel

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 1045
BulkDetails.Description: Medium carbon steel, good strength

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 1095
BulkDetails.Description: High carbon steel, spring applications

BulkDetails.Name: Steel A36
BulkDetails.Description: Structural carbon steel for launch pads and ground support

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 4130 (Chromoly)
BulkDetails.Description: Chrome-moly steel, high strength-to-weight, aircraft tubing

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 4140
BulkDetails.Description: Alloy steel for high-strength hardware

BulkDetails.Name: Steel 4340
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength alloy steel for critical hardware

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 301 (Full Hard)
BulkDetails.Description: High strength stainless, spring temper

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 304
BulkDetails.Description: Common austenitic stainless steel, corrosion resistant

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 310
BulkDetails.Description: High-temperature stainless steel

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 316
BulkDetails.Description: Marine grade stainless steel

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 321
BulkDetails.Description: Titanium-stabilized stainless for high temperature

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 347
BulkDetails.Description: Columbium-stabilized for high-temperature service

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 410
BulkDetails.Description: Martensitic stainless, heat treatable

BulkDetails.Name: Stainless Steel 17-4PH
BulkDetails.Description: Precipitation-hardening stainless, high strength

BulkDetails.Name: Maraging Steel C250
BulkDetails.Description: Ultra-high-strength maraging steel

BulkDetails.Name: Maraging Steel C300
BulkDetails.Description: Very high strength maraging steel for rocket cases

BulkDetails.Name: Beryllium (Be)
BulkDetails.Description: Very light, stiff metal (high cost), used in specialized aerospace

BulkDetails.Name: Beryllium Copper C17200
BulkDetails.Description: High strength, non-sparking, used for spring contacts

BulkDetails.Name: Brass C260 (Cartridge Brass)
BulkDetails.Description: 70/30 brass, good machinability

BulkDetails.Name: Brass C360 (Free Cutting)
BulkDetails.Description: Leaded brass for precision machined parts

BulkDetails.Name: Copper C110 (ETP)
BulkDetails.Description: Electrolytic tough pitch copper, high conductivity

BulkDetails.Name: Copper C101 (Oxygen-Free)
BulkDetails.Description: High purity copper for electronics

BulkDetails.Name: Inconel 625
BulkDetails.Description: Superalloy for high-temperature engine parts

BulkDetails.Name: Inconel 718
BulkDetails.Description: Precipitation-hardened superalloy for high-temperature hardware

BulkDetails.Name: Inconel X-750
BulkDetails.Description: High-temperature alloy for springs and bolts

BulkDetails.Name: Lead (Pb)
BulkDetails.Description: High density metal used for ballast and counterweights

BulkDetails.Name: Monel 400
BulkDetails.Description: Nickel-copper alloy, corrosion resistant

BulkDetails.Name: Monel K-500
BulkDetails.Description: Precipitation-hardened Monel for high strength

BulkDetails.Name: Tungsten (W)
BulkDetails.Description: Very high density, used for counterweights and ballast

BulkDetails.Name: Tungsten Heavy Alloy (W-Ni-Fe)
BulkDetails.Description: Sintered tungsten alloy for precision ballast

BulkDetails.Name: Cast Iron (Gray)
BulkDetails.Description: Used for launch pads, rail stands, or ballast

BulkDetails.Name: Ductile Iron (Nodular)
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength cast iron for hardware

BulkDetails.Name: ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene)
BulkDetails.Description: Common thermoplastic for 3D printed parts, durable

BulkDetails.Name: Acrylic (PMMA)
BulkDetails.Description: Transparent plastic for canopies and payload bays

BulkDetails.Name: Acrylonitrile Styrene Acrylate (ASA)
BulkDetails.Description: UV-resistant alternative to ABS for outdoor use

BulkDetails.Name: Delrin (Acetal / POM)
BulkDetails.Description: Low friction, high stiffness, used for rail buttons and bushings

BulkDetails.Name: HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene)
BulkDetails.Description: High density polyethylene, used for cutting boards and sleds

BulkDetails.Name: LDPE (Low-Density Polyethylene)
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible plastic for bags and liners

BulkDetails.Name: Nylon 6
BulkDetails.Description: Engineering plastic, tough and wear-resistant

BulkDetails.Name: Nylon 6/6
BulkDetails.Description: Most common nylon for structural parts

BulkDetails.Name: Nylon 12
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible nylon for powder bed fusion (SLS) printing

BulkDetails.Name: PEEK
BulkDetails.Description: High-performance thermoplastic for high-temperature parts

BulkDetails.Name: PEI (Ultem)
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength thermoplastic for custom parts

BulkDetails.Name: PETG
BulkDetails.Description: Polyethylene terephthalate glycol, durable and clear

BulkDetails.Name: PLA (Polylactic Acid)
BulkDetails.Description: Bioplastic, common for 3D printing prototypes

BulkDetails.Name: Polycarbonate (PC)
BulkDetails.Description: High impact resistance, used for clear tubes and canopies

BulkDetails.Name: Polypropylene (PP)
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible thermoplastic for hinges and containers

BulkDetails.Name: Polystyrene (PS)
BulkDetails.Description: Rigid, brittle plastic for low-cost prototyping

BulkDetails.Name: PTFE (Teflon)
BulkDetails.Description: Low friction, chemically inert for bushings and seals

BulkDetails.Name: PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride)
BulkDetails.Description: Rigid plastic for plumbing and structures

BulkDetails.Name: PVDF (Kynar)
BulkDetails.Description: Fluoropolymer with high chemical resistance

BulkDetails.Name: TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane)
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible filament for shock-absorbing parts

BulkDetails.Name: Blue Tube (Phenolic-impregnated paper)
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength paper tube for rocketry airframes

BulkDetails.Name: Carbon Fiber (UD, 60% fiber)
BulkDetails.Description: Unidirectional carbon/epoxy for high-stiffness parts

BulkDetails.Name: Carbon Fiber (Plain Weave)
BulkDetails.Description: Woven carbon fabric for tubes and plates

BulkDetails.Name: Carbon Fiber (Twill Weave)
BulkDetails.Description: Aesthetic twill weave for high-performance parts

BulkDetails.Name: E-Glass / Epoxy (Woven)
BulkDetails.Description: Fiberglass cloth in epoxy matrix, common for tubes

BulkDetails.Name: E-Glass / Polyester
BulkDetails.Description: Low-cost fiberglass for structural parts

BulkDetails.Name: Fiberglass (S-Glass)
BulkDetails.Description: Higher-strength fiberglass for demanding parts

BulkDetails.Name: FR-4 (G-10 Fiberglass)
BulkDetails.Description: Woven glass/epoxy laminate for electronics and fins

BulkDetails.Name: Kevlar 29 / Epoxy
BulkDetails.Description: Aramid fiber composite, impact-resistant

BulkDetails.Name: Kevlar 49 / Epoxy
BulkDetails.Description: High-modulus aramid composite for strength

BulkDetails.Name: Nomex Honeycomb Core
BulkDetails.Description: Aramid paper honeycomb for sandwich panels

BulkDetails.Name: Phenolic Canvas (Micarta)
BulkDetails.Description: Linen or canvas phenolic composite for electrical and mechanical parts

BulkDetails.Name: Phenolic Linen (XX Grade)
BulkDetails.Description: Phenolic linen laminate for high-strength electrical parts

BulkDetails.Name: Phenolic Paper (XXX Grade)
BulkDetails.Description: Paper-based phenolic for electrical insulation

BulkDetails.Name: Quantum Tube
BulkDetails.Description: Phenolic overwrap tubing, stiff and strong

BulkDetails.Name: S-Glass / Epoxy
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength fiberglass composite

BulkDetails.Name: Balsa Wood (Light, 8 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: Very lightweight wood for fins and nose cones

BulkDetails.Name: Balsa Wood (Medium, 12 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: Medium density balsa for balanced weight/strength

BulkDetails.Name: Balsa Wood (Heavy, 16 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: High-density balsa for durability

BulkDetails.Name: Baltic Birch Plywood (3-ply)
BulkDetails.Description: Aircraft grade birch plywood for bulkheads and centering rings

BulkDetails.Name: Baltic Birch Plywood (5-ply)
BulkDetails.Description: Multi-ply birch plywood for structural parts

BulkDetails.Name: Basswood
BulkDetails.Description: Harder than balsa, used for fins and nose cones

BulkDetails.Name: Birch Plywood (Aircraft Grade)
BulkDetails.Description: High-quality birch plywood for centering rings

BulkDetails.Name: Cardboard (Kraft, corrugated)
BulkDetails.Description: Common paper-based tube material for model rockets

BulkDetails.Name: Cardboard (Solid, 1/16")
BulkDetails.Description: Solid chipboard for centering rings

BulkDetails.Name: Kraft Paper Tube (Standard)
BulkDetails.Description: Vulcanized kraft paper, standard hobby tubes

BulkDetails.Name: Kraft Paper Tube (Heavy Wall)
BulkDetails.Description: Thick paper tubing for high-power rockets

BulkDetails.Name: MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard)
BulkDetails.Description: Engineered wood for fixtures and jigs

BulkDetails.Name: Oak Wood
BulkDetails.Description: Hardwood for launch pads and groundsupport

BulkDetails.Name: Pine Wood
BulkDetails.Description: Softwood for jigs and non-structural parts

BulkDetails.Name: Plywood (Lauan)
BulkDetails.Description: Low-cost plywood for fin templates and jigs

BulkDetails.Name: Polyurethane Foam (Rigid, 2 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: Lightweight foam for nose cones and fillets

BulkDetails.Name: Polyurethane Foam (Rigid, 4 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: Medium density foam for structural cores

BulkDetails.Name: Polyurethane Foam (Rigid, 6 lb/cu ft)
BulkDetails.Description: High-density foam for tip-to-tip applications

BulkDetails.Name: EPS Foam (Expanded Polystyrene)
BulkDetails.Description: Low density foam for prototyping and floats

BulkDetails.Name: XPS Foam (Extruded Polystyrene)
BulkDetails.Description: High-density blue/ pink foam boards

BulkDetails.Name: PVC Foam (Divinycell)
BulkDetails.Description: Marine-grade structural foam for composites

BulkDetails.Name: Rohacell Foam
BulkDetails.Description: Rigid polymethacrylimide foam for high-temp composites

BulkDetails.Name: Cyanoacrylate (CA, Medium)
BulkDetails.Description: Super glue, fast-setting for most bonds

BulkDetails.Name: Cyanoacrylate (Thin)
BulkDetails.Description: Low-viscosity CA for wicking into joints

BulkDetails.Name: Cyanoacrylate (Thick / Gel)
BulkDetails.Description: Gap-filling CA for uneven surfaces

BulkDetails.Name: Epoxy (5-minute)
BulkDetails.Description: Fast-curing epoxy for quick assembly

BulkDetails.Name: Epoxy (30-minute)
BulkDetails.Description: General purpose epoxy for structural bonds

BulkDetails.Name: Epoxy (West System 105/205)
BulkDetails.Description: High-performance laminating epoxy for composites

BulkDetails.Name: Wood Glue (PVA, white)
BulkDetails.Description: PVA glue for paper and wood assembly

BulkDetails.Name: Wood Glue (Aliphatic, yellow)
BulkDetails.Description: Yellow glue for stronger wood bonds

BulkDetails.Name: Bondo (Polyester Filler)
BulkDetails.Description: Body filler for smoothing surfaces

BulkDetails.Name: Epoxy (High Temperature)
BulkDetails.Description: High heat resistant epoxy for motor mounts

BulkDetails.Name: Epoxy (Flexible)
BulkDetails.Description: Rubber-toughened epoxy for shock absorption

BulkDetails.Name: Filament Tape (Strapping Tape)
BulkDetails.Description: Fiber-reinforced tape for reinforcing

BulkDetails.Name: Gap-filling CA (Rubber Toughened)
BulkDetails.Description: Resilient CA for parts with vibration

BulkDetails.Name: Hot Melt Glue
BulkDetails.Description: Quick-assembly adhesive for fixture (NOT for flight-critical)

BulkDetails.Name: Masking Tape
BulkDetails.Description: Low-tack tape for masking during painting

BulkDetails.Name: Plastic Model Cement
BulkDetails.Description: Solvent-based cement for polystyrene parts

BulkDetails.Name: Polyurethane Glue (Gorilla)
BulkDetails.Description: Expanding, moisture-curing polyurethane glue

BulkDetails.Name: Silicone Adhesive / Sealant
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible adhesive for electronics and seals

BulkDetails.Name: Ripstop Nylon (1.1 oz)
BulkDetails.Description: Lightweight nylon for parachutes

BulkDetails.Name: Ripstop Nylon (2.0 oz)
BulkDetails.Description: Heavy-duty nylon for large parachutes

BulkDetails.Name: Mylar (BoPET)
BulkDetails.Description: Polyester film for streamers and lightweight parachutes

BulkDetails.Name: Nomex Heat Shield
BulkDetails.Description: Flame-resistant fabric for shock cords

BulkDetails.Name: Kevlar Shock Cord
BulkDetails.Description: High-strength, low-stretch cord for recovery

BulkDetails.Name: Nylon Shock Cord
BulkDetails.Description: Elastic cord for low-power rocket recovery

BulkDetails.Name: Tubular Nylon Webbing
BulkDetails.Description: Woven nylon for harnesses and recovery systems

BulkDetails.Name: Copper Clad Laminate (PCB)
BulkDetails.Description: Circuit board material for custom electronics

BulkDetails.Name: Lead-Free Solder (Sn96.5/Ag3.5)
BulkDetails.Description: Lead-free solder for electronics assembly

BulkDetails.Name: Lexan (Polycarbonate Sheet)
BulkDetails.Description: Impact-resistant clear sheet for payload windows

BulkDetails.Name: Nose Cone Plastic (HIPS)
BulkDetails.Description: High Impact Polystyrene for blow-molded nose cones

BulkDetails.Name: Nose Cone Plastic (ABS)
BulkDetails.Description: Injection molded ABS nose cones

BulkDetails.Name: Nose Cone Plastic (Polypropylene)
BulkDetails.Description: Blow-molded polypropylene nose cones, very durable

BulkDetails.Name: Paper Centering Ring Material
BulkDetails.Description: Layered paper or cardstock for centering rings

BulkDetails.Name: Phenolic Centering Ring Material
BulkDetails.Description: Layered phenolic for structural rings

BulkDetails.Name: Primer (Spray, Acrylic)
BulkDetails.Description: Sandable primer for surface prep before paint

BulkDetails.Name: Rattle Can Paint (Enamel)
BulkDetails.Description: Standard spray paint for finishing

BulkDetails.Name: Rattle Can Paint (Lacquer)
BulkDetails.Description: High-gloss, fast-drying spray paint

BulkDetails.Name: Clear Coat (Acrylic Lacquer)
BulkDetails.Description: Protective clear finish for paint

BulkDetails.Name: Clear Coat (2K Urethane)
BulkDetails.Description: Professional-grade durable clear finish

BulkDetails.Name: Sandpaper (Aluminum Oxide)
BulkDetails.Description: Abrasive paper for surface prep

BulkDetails.Name: Sandpaper (Silicon Carbide)
BulkDetails.Description: Wet sanding abrasive for fine finishing

BulkDetails.Name: Masking Fluid (Liquid Mask)
BulkDetails.Description: Peelable coating for masking details

BulkDetails.Name: Launch Lug Cardboard Tube
BulkDetails.Description: Small paper tube for launch lugs

BulkDetails.Name: Launch Lug Nylon Tubing
BulkDetails.Description: Solid nylon tube for launch lugs

BulkDetails.Name: Kapton Tape (Polyimide)
BulkDetails.Description: High-temperature tape for electronics and motor

BulkDetails.Name: Teflon Tape (PTFE)
BulkDetails.Description: Low friction tape for threads and seals

BulkDetails.Name: Duct Tape
BulkDetails.Description: Heavy-duty cloth tape for temporary fixes

BulkDetails.Name: Silicone Rubber (High Temp)
BulkDetails.Description: Flexible high-temperature silicone for motor seals

BulkDetails.Name: Viton Rubber
BulkDetails.Description: High-performance fluoroelastomer for fuel exposure

BulkDetails.Name: Buna-N Rubber (Nitrile)
BulkDetails.Description: Oil-resistant rubber for seals

BulkDetails.Name: EPDM Rubber
BulkDetails.Description: Weather-resistant rubber for seals and o-rings

BulkDetails.Name: Zirconia (ZrO2)
BulkDetails.Description: Ceramic for high-temperature insulation and nozzles

BulkDetails.Name: Alumina (Al2O3)
BulkDetails.Description: High-temperature ceramic for insulating components

BulkDetails.Name: Glass-Filled Ceramic (MACOR)
BulkDetails.Description: Machinable glass ceramic for custom parts

BulkDetails.Name: Refractory Cork (Ablative)
BulkDetails.Description: Ablative cork for heat shields and nozzle insulation

BulkDetails.Name: Nomex Paper (Flame Resistant)
BulkDetails.Description: Flame-resistant paper for heat shielding

BulkDetails.Name: Phenolic-Impregnated Ablative Material
BulkDetails.Description: Highly ablative material for nozzles
